name: linkedin-posts-comments
description: Daily automation workflow for finding qualified LinkedIn posts, marking irrelevant posts, and drafting short comment options into a provided Google Sheet.

interface.shortDescription: Research LinkedIn posts into a provided Sheet.
interface.longDescription: Find a requested number of recent LinkedIn posts from simple daily instructions, use the user's Apify key with sensible defaults, prefer a Past Month search window for niche B2B topics, generate five low-key comment options for each scraped post row, mark low-quality or off-topic posts as irrelevant, and append rows to the Google Sheet supplied by the automation.
defaultPrompt: Use $linkedin-posts-comments with my sheet, keywords, filter, and Apify key.
Use $linkedin-posts-comments to find LinkedIn posts and draft comments.
Use $linkedin-posts-comments to append qualified posts to my Sheet.
